test.detail: 848 system tests passed across 30 test suites

nonBlockingIssues.description: format_u32 helper duplicated across 3 files (init, GPU driver, 9p driver). Could be consolidated into a shared utility if a format-helpers module is added to sys or ipc library.

Yield-based stagger (8 yields between process starts) is a timing heuristic. If process initialization becomes heavier, interleaving could return. Mitigated by single-syscall print consolidation which prevents intra-line garbling.

Deletion reducing total line count may leave stale pixels in the last-line region until next full-screen present. Edge case only, mitigated by incremental-content-render commit which recomputes damage differently.
Serial logging of dirty rect dimensions runs on every partial present. Good for debugging but adds serial I/O overhead to hot path. Consider gating behind compile-time flag.
damage.dirty_rects() called three times per frame instead of extracting once into a local variable.
Cursor-only movement between lines over-dirties: renders all lines from min(old,new) to document end instead of just the two cursor lines.
draw_tt_sel_scroll_lines is O(n) in document size even for single-line renders. Acceptable for current document sizes.
No pixel-level unit test for draw_tt_sel_scroll_lines; dirty-line computation is tested but not the selective rendering output itself.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the IPC message type numbering convention: 1-7 for device config, 8 for GPU_READY, 20 for PRESENT, 30-39 for editor↔compositor, 40+ for filesystem. Prevents accidental type ID collisions as more IPC messages are added.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sequence-boot-logging review found MSG_GPU_READY=8 added as a new type. init/main.rs defines MSG_DEVICE_CONFIG=1 through MSG_GPU_READY=8, MSG_PRESENT=20, MSG_WRITE_INSERT=30 through MSG_WRITE_DELETE_RANGE=34, MSG_FS_READ_REQUEST=40. The gaps (9-19, 21-29, 35-39) are implicit reservations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update test baseline count from '859 tests (838 system + 21 prototype)' to '869 tests (848 system + 21 prototype)'. The responsive-rendering milestone added 10 new system tests (4 from dirty-rect-presents, 6 from incremental-content-render).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: incremental-content-render review noted discrepancy: AGENTS.md says 859 total (838 system) but actual system test count is now 848. Worker handoff confirms 848 system tests passing.

rejectedObservations.observation: DamageTracker create-per-frame vs reset-and-reuse pattern is undocumented
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor style preference. Both patterns work correctly for stack-allocated types in bare-metal. Not impactful enough to document as a convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: Content+status+shadow surface coupling in dirty rect logic is undocumented
rejectedObservations.reason: Already partially covered by architecture.md Multi-Surface Compositing section. The coupling is inherent to the surface layout and would change if the surface list changes (e.g., status bar removal in next milestone). Documenting it now would create stale guidance.
